title: Matheson, Michael - former Cabinet Secretary for NHS Recovery, Health and Social Care, Scottish Government - ACOBA Advice
body: "Mr Matheson left his role at the Scottish Government in February 2024  Ambassador, Asthma and Allergy Foundation Michael Matheson sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with Asthma and Allergy Foundation. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in August 2024; and the appointment was taken up in September 2024. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
